title: Luscious Nutty Tunisian Chickpeas Tagine
description: A dense, nutty chickpea tagine with cilantro and a savory wok‑hei sauce, perfect for a date night.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a heavy pot over medium heat and sauté the diced onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in the cumin, smoked paprika, coriander, and cinnamon and cook for 30 seconds to toast the spices.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the chickpeas, coconut milk, soy sauce, and chopped dates, stirring to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the tagine simmer for 15 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Stir in the ground almonds and tomato paste (if desired), simmering uncovered for an additional 5 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Finish by stirring in the chopped cilantro just before serving.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with extra cilantro and a squeeze of lemon juice.
